wiki:concepts/aoe2-building-placement.description: Understanding effective building placement is crucial for maximizing your base's efficiency and defensive capabilities in Age of Empires II.

wiki:concepts/aoe2-economy-balance.description: Balancing resource accumulation is key to efficient gameplay in Age of Empires II. Proper management prevents waste while ensuring sufficient resources for progression.

wiki:concepts/aoe2-map-awareness.description: Map awareness is a fundamental gameplay concept that involves staying alert to what's happening on the map during play.

wiki:concepts/aoe2-military-strategy.description: Military strategy in Age of Empires II encompasses the principles of unit combat effectiveness, force multiplication, and tactical positioning that determine success in battles.

wiki:concepts/aoe2-uptimes.description: Uptimes refer to the timing and efficiency of upgrading from one age to the next in Age of Empires II.

wiki:concepts/compound-interest.description: Compound interest is interest calculated on a principal amount after previous interest has been added back into that principal.
